creator: GNUtoo@no-log.org
text:
I installed asterisk and i added preload => chan_sip.so at the end of /usr/local/etc/asterisk modules.conf
and after i had this in my asterisk logs and on the screen when i launch it manually(see my other bugreport for why i launch it manually)
[Jul 13 16:57:26] WARNING[71068] loader.c: Error loading module 'chan_sip.so': /usr/local/lib/asterisk/modules/chan_sip.so: Undefined symbol "ast_park_call"

How-To-Repeat: see Full Description
